entries.name: AC Bonus
entries.summary: Raises the character's Armour Class by making them harder to hit, damage, or target.

entries.name: Alternate Identity
entries.summary: Gives the character alternate outward identities without changing their underlying statistics.

entries.name: Armour Proficiency
entries.summary: Removes the penalties for using a selected armour category.

entries.name: Augmented
entries.summary: Represents an Ability Score increase granted by a defined source such as magic, size, or equipment.

entries.name: Change State
entries.summary: Lets the character temporarily become liquid, gaseous, incorporeal, or energy-like.

entries.name: Cognition
entries.summary: Provides extraordinary insight into information beyond ordinary senses or memory.

entries.name: Combat Mastery
entries.summary: Improves attack accuracy with a direct bonus to attack rolls.

entries.name: Combat Technique
entries.summary: Grants defined combat tricks such as special attacks, defenses, or tactical options.

entries.name: Companion
entries.progression: Companions are constructed from additional Points by Rank
entries.summary: Creates a loyal NPC helper, pet, assistant, or similar subordinate built with its own traits.

entries.name: Connected
entries.summary: Represents useful social ties, memberships, contacts, patrons, or access to organizations.

entries.name: Control Environment
entries.summary: Allows limited control over a selected environmental condition in the surrounding area.

entries.name: Conversion
entries.progression: Temporarily gain +1 Point/Rank for every converted point source
entries.summary: Temporarily converts one resource or trait into bonus Points for another effect.

entries.name: Dynamic Powers
entries.summary: Provides broad flexible control over a major power theme, subject to DM oversight.

entries.name: Dynamic Powers - Lesser
entries.summary: A narrower version of Dynamic Powers focused on a limited theme or expression.

entries.name: Edge
entries.summary: Grants an advantage for a defined category of rolls or circumstances.

entries.name: Elasticity
entries.summary: Lets the body stretch, compress, or bend beyond normal physical limits.

entries.name: Energised
entries.summary: Increases the character's Energy reserve.

entries.name: Enhanced Proficiency
entries.summary: Raises the character's Proficiency Bonus beyond the normal level-based value.

entries.name: Extra Actions
entries.summary: Grants additional Bonus Actions each round, including attacks or spellcasting.

entries.name: Extra Actions - Lesser
entries.summary: Grants extra Bonus Actions that cannot be used for attacking or spellcasting.

entries.name: Fast
entries.summary: Multiplies the character's movement speed at higher Ranks.

entries.name: Features
entries.summary: Covers secondary traits and utility abilities that do not need a larger Attribute.

entries.name: Flight
entries.summary: Gives the character controlled aerial movement with speed determined by Rank.

entries.name: Forced Disadvantage
entries.summary: Forces disadvantage on a defined category of enemy rolls or contest checks.

entries.name: Healing
entries.summary: Restores Hit Points to a touched target and can support advanced recovery at higher Ranks.

entries.name: Heightened Senses
entries.summary: Improves one selected ordinary sense per Rank.

entries.name: Immunity
entries.summary: Provides strong protection or immunity against a selected damage type, condition, or effect.

entries.name: Immunity - Lesser
entries.summary: A narrower immunity focused on a limited source, condition, or category.

entries.name: Immutable
entries.progression: +2 Check Bonus/Rank to Resist Bodily Effects
entries.summary: Helps resist unwanted bodily transformation, movement, or physical alteration.

entries.name: Inspire
entries.summary: Bolsters allies with bonuses to relevant checks during a scene.

entries.name: Inspire - Greater
entries.summary: Extends Inspire to stronger combat-facing rolls such as attacks and Saving Throws.

entries.name: Item
entries.summary: Creates a significant personal item or piece of gear built from Points.

entries.name: Jumping
entries.summary: Increases the distance the character can leap.

entries.name: Language
entries.summary: Adds fluency in one additional language per Rank.

entries.name: Massive Damage
entries.summary: Raises damage output for a broad class of physical attacks.

entries.name: Massive Damage - Lesser
entries.summary: Raises damage output for a narrower attack category.

entries.name: Mimic
entries.scope: Self only; Must touch character; 1 minute
entries.progression: Can imitate Attributes up to a maximum Rank
entries.summary: Temporarily copies another character's Attributes within Rank limits.

entries.name: Mind Control
entries.summary: Influences, commands, or manipulates a target's mind.

entries.name: Mind Control - Lesser
entries.summary: A restricted form of Mind Control limited to a narrow target category or effect.

entries.name: Mind Shield
entries.progression: +2 Check Bonus/Rank to Resist Mind-Affecting Effects
entries.summary: Improves resistance against mental intrusion and psychic influence.

entries.name: Minions
entries.summary: Provides a group of minor followers or helpers.

entries.name: Minions - Greater
entries.summary: Provides stronger or more capable minions than the standard version.

entries.name: Monster Training
entries.summary: Adds techniques for commanding, coordinating, or improving trained monsters.

entries.name: Mulligan
entries.summary: Allows a limited number of rerolls during each game session.

entries.name: Nullify
entries.progression: Can nullify Attributes up to a maximum Rank
entries.summary: Suppresses or cancels another character's Attributes within Rank limits.

entries.name: Pocket Dimension
entries.summary: Creates or accesses a personal extradimensional space.

entries.name: Portal
entries.scope: External and Ongoing; or 1 touched target
entries.summary: Creates portals for travel between locations or dimensions.

entries.name: Protected
entries.summary: Provides a defined protection such as cover, safeguarding, or resistance to harm.

entries.name: Regeneration
entries.summary: Restores Hit Points each round and can represent extreme recovery at high Ranks.

entries.name: Resilient
entries.summary: Lets the character survive hostile environments or ignore selected conditions.

entries.name: Saving Throw Proficiency
entries.summary: Adds Proficiency Bonus to Saving Throws for one selected Ability Score.

entries.name: Sixth Sense
entries.summary: Detects a defined category of hidden or unusual phenomenon.

entries.name: Size Change
entries.summary: Temporarily increases or decreases the character's size.

entries.name: Size Change - Lesser
entries.summary: A version of Size Change limited to either growing or shrinking.

entries.name: Skill Proficiency
entries.summary: Adds one selected Skill proficiency per Rank.

entries.name: Special Movement
entries.summary: Adds special movement options such as climbing, wall-crawling, swinging, or similar mobility.

entries.name: Spell Amplification
entries.summary: Allows limited spell modification or amplification during play.

entries.name: Spell-Like Ability
entries.summary: Represents a spell effect possessed as an innate or unusual ability.

entries.name: Supersense
entries.summary: Grants a sense beyond ordinary human capability.

entries.name: Telepathy
entries.summary: Reads, transmits, and at higher Ranks probes or alters thoughts and memories.

entries.name: Telepathy - Lesser
entries.summary: A narrower form of Telepathy restricted to a defined target category.

entries.name: Teleport
entries.summary: Moves the character instantly between locations without crossing the space between.

entries.name: Tool Proficiency
entries.summary: Adds one selected tool proficiency per Rank.

entries.name: Tough
entries.summary: Raises the character's maximum Hit Points.

entries.name: Transfer
entries.progression: Transfer Attributes at a maximum Rank
entries.summary: Temporarily gives one of the character's Attributes to another target.

entries.name: Tunnelling
entries.summary: Allows the character to move through earth, stone, or similar material.

entries.name: Undetectable
entries.summary: Makes the character difficult or impossible to detect by selected senses or techniques.

entries.name: Unique Attribute
entries.summary: Covers custom abilities whose cost and effects are set with DM approval.

entries.name: Unknown Power
entries.summary: Represents a hidden or unrevealed power whose exact function is intentionally unknown.

entries.name: Water Speed
entries.summary: Improves swimming or aquatic movement speed.

entries.name: Wealth
entries.summary: Provides unusual financial resources, income, assets, or purchasing power.

entries.name: Weapon
entries.summary: Builds a natural, supernatural, or item-based attack with damage and weapon options.

entries.name: Weapon Proficiency
entries.summary: Adds proficiency with selected weapon groups or specific weapons.
